gather_economic_intel.name: Gather Economic Intelligence
gather_economic_intel.description: Infiltrate economic ministries and corporations to assess industrial output, resource stockpiles, and upcoming projects.

failure.description: The operation failed to yield meaningful intelligence.

assess_military_readiness.name: Assess Military Readiness
assess_military_readiness.description: Monitor troop movements, training exercises, and supply depots to evaluate military preparedness.

success.description: Detailed assessment of enemy military readiness completed.

failure.description: Failed to gather reliable military intelligence.

sabotage_factory.name: Sabotage Industrial Production
sabotage_factory.description: Infiltrate key factories and delay or damage production lines.

success.description: Significant disruption to industrial output achieved.

disrupt_supply.name: Disrupt Supply Convoys
disrupt_supply.description: Target logistics networks and transportation infrastructure.

success.description: Enemy supply lines were successfully harassed.

failure.description: The operation was detected and neutralized.

influence_propaganda.name: Run Influence Campaign
influence_propaganda.description: Spread propaganda and support opposition groups within the target nation.

failure.description: The influence operation had little effect.

corrupt_officials.name: Corrupt Key Officials
corrupt_officials.description: Bribe or compromise mid-to-high level government and military officials.

success.description: Valuable contacts established inside the target government.

failure.description: The corruption attempt was rebuffed or exposed.

steal_research.name: Steal Research Documents
steal_research.description: Infiltrate research laboratories and acquire technical documents.

partial.description: Some useful research material was obtained.

infiltrate_research_lab.name: Infiltrate Research Facility
infiltrate_research_lab.description: Plant an agent inside a high-security research complex for long-term intelligence.

success.description: Agent successfully embedded in the research facility.

partial.description: Partial access to the facility was achieved.

counter_intel_sweep.name: Counter-Intelligence Sweep
counter_intel_sweep.description: Hunt for enemy agents and disrupt ongoing espionage operations in your own territory.

success.description: Several enemy networks were rolled up.

failure.description: The sweep turned up little of value.

double_agent_recruitment.name: Turn Enemy Agents
double_agent_recruitment.description: Identify and flip enemy operatives operating inside your borders.

success.description: Enemy intelligence networks suffered major setbacks.

partial.description: Limited success in turning hostile assets.

failure.description: The operation backfired and exposed friendly assets.

secure_research_facility.name: Harden Research Security
secure_research_facility.description: Tighten security around sensitive research programs to prevent technology theft.

success.description: Research facilities are now significantly harder to penetrate.

partial.description: Some improvements to research security were made.

failure.description: The security review was largely ineffective.
